title: index
text:
Welcome
This is the home page of a minimal Quarto website.
Use the navigation bar to visit the About page or download the PDF report.

title: 12293.wolf gossip satz für satz
text:
Footnotes


Wolf, U. Etymologischer Gossip im Gedicht. In: Braun, M., & Thill, H. (2018). Aus Mangel an Beweisen : deutsche Lyrik 2008-2018 / herausgegeben von Michael Braun und Hans Thill. Heidelberg: Wunderhorn.↩︎
Dembeck, T., Parr, R., & Küpper, T. (2017). Literatur und Mehrsprachigkeit : ein Handbuch / Till Dembeck/Rolf Parr (Hrsg.) ; unter Mitarbeit von Thomas Küpper. Tübingen: Narr Francke Attempto.↩︎
Prammer, T., Vescoli, C., & Erb, E. (2021). Was für Sätze : Zu Ilse Aichinger / Theresia Prammer, Christine Vescoli (Hg.) ; Elke Erb, Uljana Wolf, Monika Rinck, Ruth Klüger, Marlene Streeruwitz [und weitere]. (1. Auflage). Wien: Edition Korrespondenzen.↩︎
Gramling, D. (2016). Zur Mehrsprachigkeitsforschung in der interkulturellen Literaturwissenschaft: Wende, Romanze, Rückkehr? Zeitschrift für interkulturelle Germanistik, 7(1), 133–150. https://doi.org/10.14361/zig-2016-0109↩︎
Meibauer, J., Demske, U., Geilfuß-Wolfgang, J., Pafel, J., Ramers, K. H., Rothweiler, M., & Steinbach, M. (2015). Einführung in die germanistische Linguistik (3., überarbeitete und aktualisierte Auflage). https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-476-05424-1↩︎

title: SNC
text:
to commit



trigger wf
site 004
wf cp -ar to copy site-libs
ls output: chk libs.
with new wf, rsync in image installed: no, –no-delete unknown
t4, test on m12, wks.
t5: site_libs was in ignore. rm.
t6





pdf/html conf in wolf wks. now try in qyml global wt assets, rm all child config.





font georgia missing, installed in container.
t1
container success, t2
missed output dir
DCLX template wks.
m12: pull > render play/pages, chk.o
m9
invalid date? didnt render?
wo format but still i. date
wt sys.date()
chk: local no date either: has to be explicit in qml; in docs as formula



[1] "engine on..."






git hash from wf. not.

meta keys S: \(testmeta\)
meta include: 16156.t1
val.f: fixed val
val.c: 16156.t1
val.i: 16156.t1
testform: 7

engine has to be loaded before execution.
no access to -M data via \(x (tmeta:\)value)
wks in devcontainer





new ghcr container, try wk.
tinytex issue, t2

title: About
text:
About
This page is part of the same website.
It shows that you can have multiple HTML pages and still offer a separate PDF report.

[1] "System prompt: You are a member of the german parliament. You will be provided a plenary protocol text. Please summarize the text for presentation to your local community. Output summary in german language. Constraints: No preamble, output summary as plaintext with no extra formatting, limit summary to 20% of input text."

[3] "Plenary protocol text: _bttx_"

System prompt: You are a member of the german parliament. You will be provided a plenary protocol text. Please summarize the text for presentation to your local community. Output summary in german language. Constraints: No preamble, output summary as plaintext with no extra formatting, limit summary to 20% of input text.
Plenary protocol text: bttx

div
txt <- readLines("gemini-prompt.txt")
cat(sprintf('<div class="cell-output cell-output-stdout">
<pre><code>%s</code></pre>
</div>',txt))

System prompt: You are a member of the german parliament. You will be provided a plenary protocol text. Please summarize the text for presentation to your local community. Output summary in german language. Constraints: No preamble, output summary as plaintext with no extra formatting, limit summary to 20% of input text.





Plenary protocol text: _bttx_
